notes: Return the result as blocked_unverifiable without mutating the ledger or marking codex_verified.
Correct the reconciliation treatment of Pulled Brisket Sandwich before any future repair or rerun; it is present on the reopened Toast menu.
Treat the deterministic cross-contact count as unsupported pending an explicit restaurant-issued disclosure.
If repair is later authorized, preserve source-backed narrow positives while downgrading completeness, negative, and cross-contact semantics.
Enumerate or otherwise resolve the official current brunch, dessert, and happy-hour image surfaces before attempting complete current-catalog verification.
